name: SomeIpSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints
title: SomeIpSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints
syntax: long SomeIpSetMulticastReceiverEndpoints(dword cevgHandle, dword multicastIPv4Address, dword udpPort);
description: Sets the multicast endpoint that is used for the consumed event group to receive field/event notification per multicast.

parameters.name: cevgHandle
parameters.description: Consumed event group handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetConsumedObjectHandle)
